'''sathomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ceaselessness|ceaselessness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ceaselessness|ceaselessness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sathomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæthemeth|sæthemeth]] || [[word:sæthemej|sæthemej]] || [[word:sæthemesh|sæthemesh]] || [[word:sætheme|sætheme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sathothomoth|sathothomoth]] || [[word:sathothomoj|sathothomoj]] || [[word:sathothomosh|sathothomosh]] || [[word:sathothomo|sathothomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sathomoth|sathomoth]] || [[word:sathomoj|sathomoj]] || [[word:sathomosh|sathomosh]] || [[word:sathomo|sathomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sathofmoth|sathofmoth]] || [[word:sathofmoj|sathofmoj]] || [[word:sathofmosh|sathofmosh]] || [[word:sathofmof|sathofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sathomotho|sathomotho]] || [[word:sathomojo|sathomojo]] || [[word:sathomosho|sathomosho]] || [[word:sathomoko|sathomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sathomoth|sathomoth]] || [[word:sathomoj|sathomoj]] || [[word:sathomosh|sathomosh]] || [[word:sathomo|sathomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sathomothol|sathomothol]] || [[word:sathomojol|sathomojol]] || [[word:sathomoshol|sathomoshol]] || [[word:sathomokol|sathomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sathomothotho|sathomothotho]] || [[word:sathomojojo|sathomojojo]] || [[word:sathomoshosho|sathomoshosho]] || [[word:sathomoko|sathomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sathomothon|sathomothon]] || [[word:sathomojon|sathomojon]] || [[word:sathomoshon|sathomoshon]] || [[word:sathomokon|sathomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sathomothoro|sathomothoro]] || [[word:sathomojoro|sathomojoro]] || [[word:sathomoshoro|sathomoshoro]] || [[word:sathomokoro|sathomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
